text:
Leave (, rom. Rību) is a spell card that can be found in the Greed Island game. It forces the target player to be transported out of the game.
__NOTOC__

Summary

This allows either the user to leave the game, or forces a target to do so. It can be used to lift the effects of spells from the target, or as a threat to other players since leaving the game and re-entering can be a real hassle, especially because all cards in the target's free slots are erased.

Trivia

The illustration of this card is specular to that of "Relegate": the player depicted is exactly the same, only facing the opposite direction, with an inverted color scheme for his clothes, and standing against an azure background instead of a yellow one.
This card was first used by Jispa on Puhat in Chapter 131 to lift the effects of a spell cast on him.
In Chapter 151, Gon's traded three "Leave" cards to players who wanted out of the game but were too weak to face the Harbormaster.
